bugs.summary: The pipefail + grep pattern causes double-counting. Fix: use grep -c with || true instead of wc -l with trailing or
Error handling: forgot to add set -e to new script, wasted 10min debugging

Slice 3 complete: ruflo plugin marketplace evaluated — 20 plugins via IPFS/Pinata, 7s+ fetch latency. Plugins are TypeScript npm packages (src/index.ts, hooks.ts) — fundamentally different from our markdown skills with companion scripts. Plugin create command appears to have a scaffolding bug (no files written). Conclusion: propagate-to-all.sh is superior for our skill distribution — instant, local, no rewrite, no IPFS dependency. SKIP plugin bridge.

Macro-to-Micro Funnel — researched systematic debugging methodologies (top-down design, Wolf fence, delta debugging, Cynefin) and integrated as default fix conduct across 3 files. Now automatic: every fix starts at system architecture, drills to root cause. No need to say 'start from architectural/systemic/macro to micro' anymore.

Built the Agent Research Methodology — a 6-phase (Frame → Discover Local → Gather External → Triangulate → Apply → Preserve) general-purpose research engine for agents. Replaced AI-topic-specific research prompt. Added architecture analysis specialization with current-state mapping, best-practice research, gap analysis, and transformation planning. Integrated with macro-to-micro funnel so Level 1 can now research architecture beyond just fixing. This is now the automatic default for any research task.
